title: Agent.xpu — On-device SoC Scheduling
summary_zh: 首個面向異質 SoC（CPU、iGPU、NPU）的 on-device agentic 引擎。Prefill 分配到 NPU、decode 分配到 iGPU。4.6× 更低延遲（reactive）、1.6–6.8× 更高吞吐量（proactive）。Intel Core Ultra 平台。
summary_en: First on-device agentic engine for heterogeneous SoCs (CPU, iGPU, NPU). Assigns prefill to NPU, decode to iGPU. 4.6x lower latency (reactive), 1.6–6.8x higher throughput (proactive). Intel Core Ultra platform.
